name: QNB CORP.
summary: QNB Corp. is a Pennsylvania bank holding company incorporated in 1984, operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary QNB Bank, a Pennsylvania-chartered commercial bank founded in 1877. The Bank operates twelve full-service community banking offices in Bucks, Montgomery, and Lehigh counties in southeastern Pennsylvania. It offers commercial loans, residential mortgage loans, consumer loans, investment securities, time deposits, demand accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, internet banking, mobile banking, electronic bill pay, and remote deposit capture services.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Loans provided to businesses in the Bank's primary market area.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Loans
products.description: Home mortgage lending products for retail customers.

products.description: Personal lending products for individual customers.

products.description: Time deposit products for individual and business customers.

products.name: Money Market Accounts
products.description: Interest-bearing deposit accounts with variable rates.

products.name: Online Savings Account
products.description: Higher-yielding savings account available through online banking.

products.name: Internet and Mobile Banking
products.description: Digital banking platform for retail and business customers.

products.name: Electronic Bill Pay
products.description: Online bill payment service for banking customers.

products.name: Remote Deposit Capture
products.description: Service allowing commercial customers to deposit checks remotely.
